name: The Timekilling Scene
desc:
You see a victim of the Time Ripper.

You can't even touch them thanks to the spatio-temporal displacement superposition phenomenon.

Is there anything you can do here to help?

options.messageDesc: Sloth & Gluttony & Pride Advantage check. Pass to gain a Keywordless E.G.O Gift.

result:
You have to go after the Time Ripper.

No time to waste.

successDesc:
You've done everything you could, but none of it yielded a meaningful result.

They can't move, and you can't physically touch them.

But you find a suspicious looking receipt from under the victim's foot.

This might be a clue.
failureDesc:
You've done everything you could, but none of it yielded a meaningful result.

They can't move, and you can't physically touch them.
1.title: Suspicious Red Cloth
